embed.title: !stop
embed.description: Pause all alert delivery without losing your tracking rules.

fields.name: Usage
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}stop` — stop receiving alerts. Tracking rules are preserved.
`{{prefix}}start` — resume.

fields.name: When to use it
fields.value: Going on holiday, in a long meeting, or just overwhelmed with notifications. `{{prefix}}stop` is preferable to `{{prefix}}untrack everything` because you keep all your filters for when you come back.

fields.name: Related
fields.value: `{{prefix}}unregister` — delete your account and all tracking (permanent)
